The [[Delvin Constructs/Legends|Delvin Constructs]] Model '''Fac L-83''' was an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] version of the [[Model Fac L-113]] light vehicle factory used by Galactic Empire. Modified to allow production of repulsorlift vehicles like [[T2-B Repulsor Tank/Legends|T2-B repulsor tank]] and [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeder]] exclusively, these factories were both commissioned by Rebel Alliance for use throughout the galaxy and purchased exclusively for use on the existing hidden bases.
